description_long: This object consists of two pumpkins placed side by side on a roughly circular, rocky base. The pumpkin on the left is carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, smiling mouth. The pumpkin on the right has a more abstract, exaggerated face with bulging eyes, a large nose, and a wavy mouth, giving it a whimsical and expressive appearance. Both pumpkins have visible stems, with the left stem standing upright and the right stem curving to the side. The pumpkins display a natural orange coloration with some lighter, carved areas and subtle surface texture. The rocky base is dark and irregular, with patches of moss or dirt, suggesting an outdoor or garden setting.
description: Two carved pumpkins with expressive faces sit on a rocky, mossy base. One features a classic jack-o'-lantern look, while the other has a whimsical, exaggerated face.
description_view_0: Front view showing both pumpkins' carved faces, with the left displaying a classic jack-o'-lantern and the right an exaggerated, bulging-eyed expression.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the right pumpkin's profile and the upright stem of the left pumpkin; facial carvings are partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the uncarved backs of both pumpkins and the full curvature of their stems.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the left pumpkin's back and stem, with the right pumpkin's face partially obscured.
attribute_carving_pattern: The left pumpkin features a traditional jack-o'-lantern carving with triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged mouth. The right pumpkin displays an abstract, exaggerated face with bulging circular eyes, a large rounded nose, and a wavy, uneven mouth. Both carvings are expressive and whimsical, with deep cutouts and some surface etching.
